parameters.content:
## ROCKY analytics receiver

The game (js/analytics.js) POSTs anonymous events here. The body arrives as text/plain JSON (a cross-origin "simple" request); the Flatten node parses it — no change needed.

**Setup**
1. This Webhook's **Production URL** must be
   `https://n8n.bworldtools.com/webhook/rocky-analytics`
   (Method POST, Path `rocky-analytics`). If your host differs, update ENDPOINT in js/analytics.js to match.
2. **Log to Sheet** node: attach your Google credential + pick your spreadsheet. Give the sheet a header row (see below).
3. **Notify me** node: attach your Telegram credential + set your chat id. (Delete this branch if you don't want finish alerts.)
4. **ACTIVATE** the workflow (top-right). Production webhooks only fire when active.

**Sheet header row (paste into row 1):**
`when  event  cid  sid  ref  chapter  chapterIndex  name  returning  durationS  furthest  furthestIndex  lang  w  h  dpr  standalone  ua  ver`

Events: visit / chapter / finished / session_end. No personal data — cid is an anonymous per-browser id.
